summary: Comprehensive testing of three-part fix: (1) Global Autocomplete - EmployeeAutocomplete component verified in all 5 modules (Attendance, Leave, Late Requests, Early Out, Employees). (2) Payroll sticky header - thead has position:sticky and top:0px confirmed. (3) Inactive employee payroll fix - inactive employees without inactive_date correctly excluded from payroll; TEST_Relieved_05658888 with inactive_date=2026-04-16 shows R status after that date, working_days=12, weekoff_pay=4. All 14 backend tests passed (100%).

features_tested.autocomplete_api_by_email: PASS - Search by email domain works
features_tested.autocomplete_api_by_emp_id: PASS - Search by EMP ID works
features_tested.autocomplete_api_no_matches: PASS - Returns empty array for non-matching query
features_tested.autocomplete_api_empty_query: PASS - Returns empty array for empty query
features_tested.autocomplete_attendance_module: PASS - EmployeeAutocomplete imported and used with data-testid='search-emp-name'
features_tested.autocomplete_leave_module: PASS - EmployeeAutocomplete imported and used with data-testid='search-emp-name'
features_tested.autocomplete_late_requests_module: PASS - EmployeeAutocomplete imported and used with data-testid='late-search'
features_tested.autocomplete_early_out_module: PASS - EmployeeAutocomplete imported and used with data-testid='early-out-search'
features_tested.autocomplete_employees_module: PASS - EmployeeAutocomplete imported and used with data-testid='filter-search'
features_tested.payroll_sticky_header: PASS - thead has position:sticky and top:0px
features_tested.inactive_without_date_excluded: PASS - EMP0043, EMP0044, EMP0045, EMP0046 (inactive without inactive_date) not in payroll
features_tested.inactive_with_date_included: PASS - TEST_Relieved_05658888 (EMP0056) with inactive_date=2026-04-16 is in payroll
features_tested.relieved_status_after_inactive_date: PASS - Days after Apr 16 show R status
features_tested.working_days_up_to_inactive_date: PASS - working_days=12 (only counts up to Apr 16)
features_tested.active_employee_payroll: PASS - Active employees appear in payroll with full month data
features_tested.payroll_summary: PASS - Summary endpoint returns correct totals

critical_code_review_comments: EmployeeAutocomplete.js is a well-designed reusable component with proper debouncing (350ms), loading state, and click-outside handling
All 5 modules correctly import and use the EmployeeAutocomplete component with appropriate data-testid attributes
Payroll.js correctly implements sticky header with 'sticky top-0 z-20' classes on thead
Backend payroll engine correctly handles inactive employees: returns None for inactive without inactive_date, shows R status after inactive_date
Working days and weekoff pay calculations correctly stop at inactive_date

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all autocomplete components verified, sticky header confirmed)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employees including TEST_Relieved_05658888 (EMP0056) with inactive_date=2026-04-16.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three-part fix verified: (1) EmployeeAutocomplete component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/EmployeeAutocomplete.js and is used in Attendance, Leave, AdminLateRequests, AdminEarlyOut, and Employees pages. (2) Payroll sticky header implemented with 'sticky top-0 z-20' on thead in Payroll.js line 259. (3) Inactive employee payroll: employees with status=Inactive and no inactive_date return None from payroll calculation; employees with inactive_date show R status after that date and working_days/weekoff_pay only count up to inactive_date. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_37.py
